# Special Handler Callback Constants

Specify an object callback function to install, get, or remove from the special handler dispatch table.

## Overview

You use these constants with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1445532-aeinstallspecialhandler], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1444274-aegetspecialhandler], or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1447960-aeremovespecialhandler] functions. 

## Constants

- **keyAERangeStart**: Specifies the first Apple event object in a desired range.
- **keyAERangeStop**: Specifies the last Apple event object in the desired range.
- **keyDisposeTokenProc**: Token disposal function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/osldisposetokenprocptr].
- **keyAECompareProc**: Object-comparison function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslcompareprocptr].
- **keyAECountProc**: Object-counting function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslcountprocptr].
- **keyAEMarkTokenProc**: Mark token function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslgetmarktokenprocptr].
- **keyAEMarkProc**: Object-marking function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslmarkprocptr].
- **keyAEAdjustMarksProc**: Mark-adjusting function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/osladjustmarksprocptr].
- **keyAEGetErrDescProc**: Get error descriptor callback function. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslgeterrdescprocptr].
